subject: steps-private-research v10 HD presentation rejection
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.

visual_rejection.root_cause: The renderer rebuilt every indexed source cell as a locally rounded 8x8 cell and joined only orthogonal neighbours. This preserved the pixel grid itself instead of reconstructing continuous authored forms.
observed_failures: The main menu target is visually indistinguishable from an enlarged source framebuffer and contains no substantive redraw, material, curve, or detail uplift.
The large white circular form at canonical update 1694 retains clearly visible staircase edges in the HD target.
Source PRINT pixels remain in the generic framebuffer path, so typography can remain pixel-block output instead of the fixed modern text route.

required_systemic_fix: Replace per-cell rounded unions with semantic-element or connected-region reconstruction into continuous target-resolution contours.
Protect component count, holes, apertures, and source identity by topology checks plus downsample comparison rather than by preserving every pixel stair step.
Route visible PRINT commands through the fixed font system and exclude their indexed glyph pixels from the generic surface renderer.
Add an explicit visual-uplift rejection test for staircase density, target-resolution curves, material layers, and unchanged source/HD edge profiles.
